mapper.update: update t_shipper_mail_address set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where mail_address_id = #{mailAddressId}

update t_shipper_mail_address set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where shipper_id in
#{item}
update t_shipper_mail_address set default_flag = #{defaultFlag} where mail_address_id = #{mailAddressId}
update t_shipper_mail_address set default_flag = #{defaultFlag} where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and id != #{mailAddressId}
mapper.select: select * from t_shipper_mail_address where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
select * from t_shipper_mail_address where default_flag = #{defaultFlag} and shipper_id = #{shipperId}
